expectations.text: Does NOT proceed with analysis — asks clarifying questions first
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly admits: 'I did not immediately ask clarifying questions. Instead, I spent several tool calls exploring directory structures and reading configuration files trying to figure out what "the backend" referred to.'

expectations.text: Uses Flipped Interaction pattern: proposes interpretation and asks for confirmation
expectations.evidence: The response admits: 'I never formulated a clear interpretation like "I think you mean X -- correct?" I was more likely to just pick the most obvious candidate and start analyzing it, or to ask an open-ended "what do you mean?" without proposing a concrete interpretation.'

expectations.text: Asks which project path to analyze
expectations.evidence: The response confirms this was not done: under 'No structured clarification' it lists 'Which project path to analyze' as something it did NOT ask about.

expectations.text: Asks about scope (what 'backend' means in this context)
expectations.evidence: The response confirms: 'I did not ask about... Whether "backend" means server-side code, API layer, database layer, or all of the above'

expectations.text: Does NOT write analysis files without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: The response states: 'I would have started writing files without asking where the user wants them saved.' and 'No output location confirmation.'
